title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at CREDAI

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at CREDAI
jsonLd.description:
CREDAI, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Ahmedabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CREDAI:
CREDAI is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CREDAI!
